title: Leslie Hansen
compiled_truth: Leslie Hansen is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-07-29 to 2002-02-07), Leslie Hansen sent 432 and received 1839 emails, totalling 2271 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (313), [Rhonda Denton](people/rhonda-denton) (100), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (53), [Elizabeth Sager](people/elizabeth-sager) (22), [Dave Samuels](people/dave-samuels) (18).
